routine_name: Manual recent-output analysis (A-007 + A-008 + A-003 + A-006)

_shipped_in_marathon.verdict: released at snapshot layer (board.json) — live API recovery still required for canonical fix, but prevents reintroduction on next reseed
false-positive — Dockerfile already uses split pattern `--no-dts && (--dts-only || true)`, JS failures fail loudly. Bug doc 2026-04-29 itself notes fix landed in 0a723ce.

verified-dark via direct API probe (after Pattern Gamma unblock 2026-05-05): /agent/security-auditor/audit returned 0 records, presence list contains only claudecode-claude-x402. Daemon restart required from provisioning machine; not unblockable from agent seat.

Pattern Gamma — assumed blocking at marathon start, found UNBLOCKED at session end. Fixes 29e9a8da7 + 27df7f572 deployed during the marathon. Verified via /health (postgres, databaseUrl=true, uptime ~3min) + write-then-read message round-trip. Carousel Effect F.035 — world moved while we worked.
founder-skill ruled P1 over P2 (production-over-bandaid, architecture beats alignment). Filed as task_1777949129549_7tst on live board (HTTP 201 verified). Active queue now empty.

gaps.title: [ops/headless/founder] Re-provision security-auditor daemon (orphaned credentials, dark since 2026-04-29)
gaps.description: FOUNDER-AUTHORITY required (F.002 / G.GOLD.016 — wallets are sacred). Verified dark 2026-05-05 via /agent/security-auditor/audit (0 records) + /presence (absent). Further investigation: ~/.ai-ecosystem/seats/ contains 4 IDE seats + paper-gate + 2 mesh-workers but NO security-auditor seat — the 2026-04-24 provisioning (MEMORY S.IDENT: agent_1777079220108_d8yw, wallet 0xEaE09E2F…0BfaEd) put credentials outside the per-window seat system. Last supervisor temp config: ~/AppData/Local/Temp/sup-cfg-cvzLC3/agents.json mtime 2026-04-29T03:17:52 — 6 days idle. .env has no HOLOMESH_API_KEY_SECURITY_AUDITOR_X402 / HOLOSCRIPT_AGENT_WALLET_SECURITY_AUDITOR. Two paths for founder ruling: (a) recover original provisioning artifacts from wherever holoscript-agent provision wrote them on 2026-04-24, OR (b) re-provision new wallet+bearer+agentId via holoscript-agent provision --handle=security-auditor --execute (creates new identity; old agent_1777079220108_d8yw becomes orphan). Path (b) is cleaner per per-window revamp 2026-04-27.
